item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
• Complete visual rewrite: one unified design driven by a new ten-theme system (Hoth, Risa, Weasley, Starbuck, Cylon, Vader, Kirk, Hermione, Nerds, System) selectable from the menu popover footer.
  • New Transcription drawer — a first-class surface alongside Settings. Recording, engine, output, summarization, and speaker controls all in one place.
  • Pause and resume live transcription from the floating banner. Red outline while recording, yellow pulsing outline when paused.
  • Friendly names for calendar accounts: set a display name per account in the main window sidebar.
  • Redesigned menu popover with live status, grouped Today / Tomorrow sections, countdown badges, and a compact footer toolbar.
  • Redesigned main window with a left sidebar of accounts and a detail pane for identity, calendars, notifications, and account management.
  • Calendar list is per-account and cached, so switching accounts in the sidebar is instant.
  • Peek window and transcription banner repainted to match the rest of the app.
  • Removed the old Simple vs Glass popover duality — there is now one design language across every surface.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
• First standalone release outside the Mac App Store, with automatic updates via Sparkle.
  • New calendar-style app icon.
  • Security hardening: strict meeting-link host allowlist, per-device keychain accessibility for OAuth tokens, and stricter permissions on the crash-recovery transcript.
  • No more Dock icon when Settings is open.
